creator: sada@bsdclub.org
text:
In article <200004271509.RAA18052@gnocchi.unix-ag.uni-kl.de>
naddy@unix-ag.uni-kl.de writes:

>> >Number:         18256
>> >Category:       ports
>> >Synopsis:       www/netscape4* lacks Fortify on alpha
:
>> >Description:
>> 
>> The www/netscape4* ports don't support WITH_128BIT on alpha because
>> the appropriate Fortify isn't used.

I have no alpha machine.
Could anybody verify this PR with alpha plathome ?

I guess this patch would be okay on i386 machines.
